{"id":"CLAW-7ad.6.6","title":"US03: Wire inbox HTTP routes and fix acceptance test failures","description":"**Problem**: US03 domain logic and use cases are implemented and unit-tested, but acceptance tests for POST /api/v1/inbox and GET /api/v1/inbox still fail. The gap is in the presentation/DI layer.

**Checklist**:
1. Verify Hono route handlers exist for POST /api/v1/inbox and GET /api/v1/inbox
2. Ensure routes are registered in the app router
3. Verify DI wiring connects routes → use cases → repositories
4. Check response DTO shape matches acceptance test expectations (status codes, JSON structure)
5. Check error handling: empty title → 400 with correct error body
6. Run acceptance tests to confirm green: `just acceptance`
7. Commit uncommitted InboxItemDto.ts changes if valid","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T22:08:52Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-06T22:08:52Z"}

2. Ensure routes are registered in the app router
3. Verify DI wiring connects routes → use cases → repositories

5. Check error handling: empty title → 400 with correct error body
6. Run acceptance tests to confirm green: `just acceptance`
7. Commit uncommitted InboxItemDto.ts changes if valid","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T22:08:52Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-06T22:09:09Z"}

{"id":"CLAW-7ad.6.7","title":"US03: Wire Hono routes and DI for inbox endpoints (integration task)","description":"**Integration wiring task** — verified by acceptance tests, not unit tests. Skip RED step; go straight to implementation and run `just acceptance` to verify.

1. Create/verify Hono route handlers: POST /api/v1/inbox (calls CaptureInboxItemUseCase) and GET /api/v1/inbox (calls ListInboxItemsUseCase or equivalent query)
2. Register routes in the app router (src/presentation/ or src/worker.ts)
3. Wire DI in serviceFactory.ts: connect route handlers → use cases → D1 repositories
4. Response shapes must match acceptance test expectations: POST returns 201 with created item JSON; GET returns 200 with items array; empty title POST returns 400 with error body
5. Commit any uncommitted changes (InboxItemDto.ts, serviceFactory.ts, worker.ts)
6. Verify green: `just acceptance`

**Note**: This is NOT a TDD task. The acceptance specs ARE the tests. Do not attempt to write unit tests for route registration.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T22:32:01Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-06T22:32:01Z"}

{"id":"CLAW-7ad.6.7","title":"US03: Wire Hono routes and DI for inbox endpoints (integration task)","description":"**Integration wiring task** — verified by acceptance tests, not unit tests. Skip RED step; go straight to implementation and run `just acceptance` to verify.

1. Create/verify Hono route handlers: POST /api/v1/inbox (calls CaptureInboxItemUseCase) and GET /api/v1/inbox (calls ListInboxItemsUseCase or equivalent query)
2. Register routes in the app router (src/presentation/ or src/worker.ts)
3. Wire DI in serviceFactory.ts: connect route handlers → use cases → D1 repositories
4. Response shapes must match acceptance test expectations: POST returns 201 with created item JSON; GET returns 200 with items array; empty title POST returns 400 with error body
5. Commit any uncommitted changes (InboxItemDto.ts, serviceFactory.ts, worker.ts)
6. Verify green: `just acceptance`

**Note**: This is NOT a TDD task. The acceptance specs ARE the tests. Do not attempt to write unit tests for route registration.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T22:32:01Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-06T22:32:11Z"}
